# Copilot Instructions for OIDC Provider Development

## Permission Context
Junie has **full permission** to run workflows, tests, builds, and deployments. No need to ask for permission to:
- Execute GitHub Actions workflows
- Run tests multiple times  
- Build and deploy the application
- Run CDK synthesis and deployment commands
- Execute Playwright end-to-end tests
- Install dependencies and run scripts

See file `.github/copilot-instructions.md` for additional details.
